sourceMovie.title: Better Man
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Better Man works as a music movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The music and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Rocketman
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Better Man clicked for you, Rocketman (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in music and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Dirt
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Better Man clicked for you, The Dirt (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in music and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Better Man?
faq.answer: Try Rocketman, The Dirt, Cobain: Montage of Heck—each shares DNA with Better Man while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Better Man?
faq.answer: Better Man (2024) is best described as Music, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Better Man worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this music lane.
